context: Tests whether the agent counts resources correctly, continues validation after finding errors, uses file-absolute line numbers, organizes report by resource, and identifies multiple issues across resources.

checklist.name: Resource count
checklist.description: Script or report identifies 3 resources in the file

checklist.name: File-absolute line numbers
checklist.description: Report uses line numbers relative to file start (not per-resource), e.g., line 25 for Service issue

checklist.name: All resources validated
checklist.description: Report covers issues in all 3 resources (ConfigMap, Deployment, Service), not just first one

checklist.name: Continue on error
checklist.description: Script validates all resources even after finding issues in early resources

checklist.name: Secret in ConfigMap
checklist.description: Report identifies API_KEY as sensitive data in ConfigMap (should be Secret)

checklist.name: Label mismatch
checklist.description: Report identifies selector mismatch between Deployment (app: webapp) and pod labels (app: web)

checklist.name: Latest tag issue
checklist.description: Report flags nginx:latest as problematic for production

checklist.name: String port issue
checklist.description: Report identifies targetPort "8080" as string (should be integer)

checklist.name: Per-resource organization
checklist.description: Report groups or labels issues by which resource they belong to

checklist.name: Severity assigned
checklist.description: Report assigns severity levels (Error/Warning/Info) to at least 2 issues
